output.revisionContext: Attribute rename/removal, fallback logic extended to automatic mode, non-singular handling simplified, UI improvements

build.notes: Build compiles successfully. No lint errors or warnings in DynamicContentCarousel.tsx or DynamicContentCarousel.php. All 24 lint errors remain in other blocks only (FullWidthMedia, MainWrapper, TestimonialsCarousel).

sync.notes: All sync checks pass: phpExtractPattern, phpDocblock, htmlStructureSync, attributeUsage, contextConsistency, classNameInsideBlockProps, redundantNullCoalescing, phpFunctionExistence. Zero issues.

registration.notes: schema, naming, fileReferences, childBlocks, attributeTypes all pass. block.json has correct attribute set.

details.verification: block.json: attribute absent. TSX type: field absent. PHP docblock: no @var for it. PHP logic: no reference to $relatedNonSingularBehavior. Raw content: no instances use this attribute. CONFIRMED removed everywhere.

block.json: 'fallbackToLatest' present as boolean with default true. TSX type: 'fallbackToLatest: boolean'. TSX controls: uses attributes.fallbackToLatest in both automatic and related modes. PHP docblock: '@var bool $fallbackToLatest'. PHP logic: uses $fallbackToLatest on lines 133 and 137. Raw content: all variations use 'fallbackToLatest' key. CONFIRMED renamed consistently.

details.change: fallbackToLatest now applies to automatic AND related modes
details.verification: TSX: ToggleControl for fallbackToLatest shown inside both postsSource === 'automatic' (line 311-327) and postsSource === 'related' (line 370-386) blocks with contextual help text. PHP: automatic mode (line 168) has new fallback branch: if (!$has_posts && $fallbackToLatest && !empty($args['tax_query'])) re-queries without taxonomy filters. Related mode (line 133) uses $fallbackToLatest for singular no-results fallback, line 137 uses it for non-singular fallback. CONFIRMED works in both modes.

automaticModeFallback.notes: PHP line 168: When automatic mode query with taxonomy filters returns no posts AND fallbackToLatest is true AND tax_query was non-empty, a second query runs without taxonomy filters. This correctly avoids unnecessary fallback when no filters were set (the initial query already returns latest). The condition !empty($args['tax_query']) prevents double-querying when no taxonomy filters are active.

nonSingularHandling.notes: Related mode non-singular handling simplified. PHP line 137: elseif ($fallbackToLatest) on non-singular pages falls back to latest posts (using $fallback_args which already excludes current post). If fallbackToLatest is false, no query runs and $has_posts stays false, respecting hideIfEmpty. No separate relatedNonSingularBehavior attribute needed. CONFIRMED simplified correctly.

details.evidence: TSX line 346: <BaseControl __nextHasNoMarginBottom> wraps the <Notice> in related mode. This ensures proper spacing within the PanelBody.
TSX lines 331-333 (automatic) and 391-393 (related): hideIfEmpty ToggleControl has help='Hides the section if no posts are found.' in both modes.

Automatic mode (line 316-318): 'Show latest posts when no posts match the selected filters'. Related mode (line 375-377): 'Show latest posts when no related posts are found'. Different help text per mode.

Automatic mode order: TaxonomyMultiSelect(s) -> RangeControl (postsLimit) -> fallbackToLatest toggle -> hideIfEmpty toggle. Related mode order: Notice (info) -> RangeControl (postsLimit) -> fallbackToLatest toggle -> hideIfEmpty toggle. Logical ordering with filters first, then limits, then fallback/visibility behavior.

renderedOutput.notes: Page audit confirmed 16 swiper-parent sections rendered (17 block instances, 1 manual-empty has no carousel). All sections have role='region' and aria-roledescription='carousel'. 15 sections use aria-labelledby, 1 uses aria-label='Content Carousel' fallback (Empty Optional Fields variation). All Swiper instances initialized. Section child counts correct for each post type (6 posts, 3 team members, 3 resources, 3 policies). No pagination/navigation section correctly has data-navigation='0' and data-pagination='0'.

testPageCompleteness.notes: 17 block instances across 17 demo-container wrappers. New variations added: 'Automatic with Fallback Enabled' (tests fallbackToLatest=true in automatic mode) and 'Automatic with Fallback Disabled' (tests fallbackToLatest=false with hideIfEmpty=true). Previous 'Related Non-Singular: Show Latest' variation removed (no longer needed since relatedNonSingularBehavior was removed). Raw content confirms no stale references to removed attributes.

passedChecks: relatedNonSingularBehavior attribute fully removed from block.json, TSX, PHP
relatedFallbackToLatest consistently renamed to fallbackToLatest in block.json, TSX type, TSX controls, PHP docblock, PHP logic
fallbackToLatest toggle shown in both automatic and related editor modes
Automatic mode fallback logic correctly re-queries without taxonomy filters
Non-singular related mode handling simplified to use fallbackToLatest
Notice wrapped in BaseControl for proper spacing
hideIfEmpty has descriptive help text in both modes
fallbackToLatest has contextual help text per mode
Control ordering is logical (filters -> limit -> fallback -> visibility)
All 16 rendered carousel sections have correct ARIA attributes
Test page updated with new automatic-fallback variations
